function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  seen.add(value);

  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
    deepFreeze(child, seen);
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

function normalizeCandidateOrder(value) {
  return Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value >= 0 ? value : 0;
}

function createAgentCandidateId(candidateOrder) {
  return `agent-a-candidate-generation:${String(candidateOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`;
}

function createProvenance({
  outputClass,
  contentFingerprint,
  boundedEvidence,
  sanitizedSummary
}) {
  return deepFreeze({
    source: PROVENANCE_SOURCE,
    agentRole: AGENT_ROLE,
    providerStatus: PROVIDER_STATUS,
    outputClass,
    contentFingerprint,
    boundedEvidence,
    sanitizedSummary
  });
}

function createRecord({
  candidateOrderValue,
  state,
  candidateKind,
  candidateStatus,
  provenance
}) {
  const candidateOrder = normalizeCandidateOrder(candidateOrderValue);
  const stagingRecord = createCandidateStagingRecord(
    {
      origin: "ai-output",
      state
    },
    candidateOrder
  );
  const authorityFlags = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags;

  return deepFreeze({
    agentCandidateId: createAgentCandidateId(candidateOrder),
    candidateId: stagingRecord.candidateId,
    origin: stagingRecord.origin,
    state: stagingRecord.state,
    candidateOrder,
    agentAStage: AGENT_A_STAGE,
    candidateKind,
    candidateStatus,
    provenance,
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags
  });
}

function createBlockedRecord(candidateOrderValue, boundedEvidence) {
  return createRecord({
    candidateOrderValue,
    state: "blocked",
    candidateKind: BLOCKED_KIND,
    candidateStatus: BLOCKED_STATUS,
    provenance: createProvenance({
      outputClass: BLOCKED_OUTPUT_CLASS,
      contentFingerprint: UNAVAILABLE_FINGERPRINT,
      boundedEvidence,
      sanitizedSummary: BLOCKED_SUMMARY
    })
  });
}

function isRecord(value) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
    return false;
  }

  if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
    return false;
  }

  return !Array.isArray(value);
}

function descriptorEntries(descriptors) {
  return Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors).map((key) => [
    key,
    descriptors[key]
  ]);
}

function descriptorValue(descriptors, field) {
  return Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field) ? descriptors[field].value : undefined;
}

function hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return (
    typeof descriptor?.get === "function" ||
    typeof descriptor?.set === "function"
  );
}

function hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return typeof descriptor?.value === "function";
}

function rawMarkerValue(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    /\bRAW_[A-Z0-9_]*_MARKER\b/u.test(value)
  );
}

function joinParts(parts) {
  return parts.join("");

function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (
    !value ||
    (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function") ||
    Object.isFrozen(value)
  ) {
    return value;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  seen.add(value);

  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
    deepFreeze(child, seen);
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

function normalizeReadinessOrder(value) {
  return Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value >= 0 ? value : 0;
}

function createPromotionReadinessId(readinessOrder) {
  return `agent-a-promotion-readiness:${String(readinessOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`;
}

function createCandidateId(candidateOrder) {
  return `candidate-staging:ai-output:${String(candidateOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`;
}

function createAgentCandidateId(candidateOrder) {
  return `agent-a-candidate-generation:${String(candidateOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`;
}

function isPlainRecord(value) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
    return false;
  }

  if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
    return false;
  }

  return !Array.isArray(value);
}

function descriptorEntries(descriptors) {
  return Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors).map((key) => [
    key,
    descriptors[key]
  ]);
}

function descriptorValue(descriptors, field) {
  return Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field) ? descriptors[field].value : undefined;
}

function hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return (
    typeof descriptor?.get === "function" ||
    typeof descriptor?.set === "function"
  );
}

function hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return typeof descriptor?.value === "function";
}

function rawMarkerValue(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    /\bRAW_[A-Z0-9_]*_MARKER\b/u.test(value)
  );
}

function getSafeDescriptors(value) {
  if (!isPlainRecord(value)) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)
        ? "hostile-caller-object"
        : "malformed-provenance"
    };
  }

  try {
    return {
      ok: true,
      descriptors: Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value)
    };
  } catch {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "hostile-caller-object"
    };
  }
}

function addReason(reasons, reason) {
  if (!reasons.includes(reason)) {
    reasons.push(reason);
  }
}

function orderedReasons(reasons) {
  return AGENT_A_PROMOTION_READINESS_BLOCKED_REASONS.filter((reason) =>
    reasons.includes(reason)
  );
}

function isExpectedAuthorityFlagContext(trail, field) {
  return (
    AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(field) &&
    (trail.length === 0 ||
      (trail.length === 1 && trail[0] === "authorityFlags"))
  );
}

function isExpectedIdentityContext(trail, field) {
  return trail.length === 0 && IDENTITY_FIELD_SET.has(field);
}

function classifyDescriptorKey(field, trail, reasons) {
  if (RAW_FIELD_SET.has(field)) {
    addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
  }

export function createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
  request = undefined,
  invocation = undefined,
  admissionOrderValue = 0
) {
  const admissionOrderAnalysis = analyzeAdmissionOrder(admissionOrderValue);
  const { admissionOrder } = admissionOrderAnalysis;
  const requestAnalysis = analyzeRequest(request);
  const invocationAnalysis = analyzeInvocation(invocation, requestAnalysis);
  const admissionBlockedReasons = deepFreeze(
    orderedReasons([
      ...admissionOrderAnalysis.reasons,
      ...requestAnalysis.reasons,
      ...invocationAnalysis.reasons
    ])
  );
  const isAdmitted = admissionBlockedReasons.length === 0;
  const authorityFlags = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags;

  return deepFreeze({
    writeIntentId: createWriteIntentId(admissionOrder),
    promotionRequestId: requestAnalysis.promotionRequestId,
    promotionReadinessId: requestAnalysis.promotionReadinessId,
    candidateId: requestAnalysis.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: requestAnalysis.agentCandidateId,
    admissionOrder,
    admissionState: isAdmitted ? ADMITTED_STATE : BLOCKED_STATE,
    writeIntentStatus: isAdmitted ? INTENT_RECORDED_STATUS : BLOCKED_STATE,
    reviewStatus: isAdmitted ? PENDING_REVIEW_STATUS : BLOCKED_STATE,
    admissionBlockedReasons,
    governedFlowKind: invocationAnalysis.governedFlowKind ?? UNAVAILABLE,
    requestEvidenceHash: createEvidenceHash(request),
    invocationEvidenceHash: createEvidenceHash(invocation),
    candidateContentFingerprint: requestAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint,
    provenanceStatus: provenanceStatusFor(admissionBlockedReasons),
    nonCanonicalStatus: nonCanonicalStatusFor(admissionBlockedReasons),
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags
  });
}

export function createAgentAWriteAdmissionRegistry() {
  let nextAdmissionOrder = 0;
  const records = [];

  const registerWriteAdmission = (request = undefined, invocation = undefined) => {
    const record = createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
      request,
      invocation,
      nextAdmissionOrder
    );
    nextAdmissionOrder += 1;
    records.push(record);

    return record;
  };

  const listWriteAdmissionRecords = () => {
    return deepFreeze([...records]);
  };

function assertNoMutablePrototypeSurface(method, label) {
  const prototypeDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(method, "prototype");

  if (prototypeDescriptor === undefined) {
    assert.equal("prototype" in method, false, `${label} must not inherit prototype`);
    return;
  }

  assert.equal(
    Object.isFrozen(prototypeDescriptor.value),
    true,
    `${label} prototype surface must be frozen`
  );
}

function acceptedEvidence(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
    agentRole: "agent-a",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
    contentFingerprint:
      "sha256:0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef",
    boundedEvidence: "present",
    sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary",
    ...overrides
  };
}

function acceptedCandidate(order = 4, evidenceOverrides = {}) {
  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
    acceptedEvidence(evidenceOverrides),
    order
  );
}

function readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder = 2) {
  return createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);
}

function readyRequest(candidateOrder = 4, readinessOrder = 2, requestOrder = 6) {
  const candidate = acceptedCandidate(candidateOrder);
  const readiness = readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);

  return {
    candidate,
    readiness,
    request: createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(
      candidate,
      readiness,
      requestOrder
    )
  };
}

function cloneRequest(request, overrides = {}) {
  return {
    ...request,
    authorityFlags: {
      ...request.authorityFlags
    },
    requestBlockedReasons: [...request.requestBlockedReasons],
    ...overrides
  };
}

function invocationEvidence(request, overrides = {}) {
  const authorityFlags = {
    ...request.authorityFlags
  };

  return {
    governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
    invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
    mutationMode: "non-mutating",
    effect: "status-only",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    operatorReviewRequired: true,
    promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
    promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
    candidateId: request.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
    candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function largeBoundedObjectEvidence(value) {
  const evidence = {};

  for (let index = 0; index < 90; index += 1) {
    evidence[`k${String(index).padStart(3, "0")}`] = { value: index };
  }

  evidence.k089 = { value };

  return evidence;
}

function deepBoundedObjectEvidence(value) {
  const root = {};
  let current = root;

  for (let index = 0; index < 14; index += 1) {
    current.next = {};
    current = current.next;
  }

  current.value = value;

  return root;
}

const STACK_SAFE_DEEP_CHAIN_LENGTH = 5000;

function deepStackEvidence(value, length = STACK_SAFE_DEEP_CHAIN_LENGTH) {
  const root = {};
  let current = root;

  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
    current.next = {};
    current = current.next;
  }

  current.value = value;

  return root;
}

function deepStackAccessorEvidence(getter, length = STACK_SAFE_DEEP_CHAIN_LENGTH) {
  const root = {};
  let current = root;

  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
    current.next = {};
    current = current.next;
  }

  Object.defineProperty(current, "value", {
    enumerable: true,
    get: getter
  });

  return root;
}

function assertDeepFrozen(value, label, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
    return;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return;
  }

function validateEvidence(descriptors) {
  if (hasDeniedField(descriptors, DENIED_RAW_FIELDS)) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "hostile"
    };
  }

  if (hasDeniedField(descriptors, DENIED_CALLER_AUTHORITY_FIELDS)) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "contradictory"
    };
  }

  const descriptorSafety = scanDescriptorValues(descriptors);

  if (!descriptorSafety.ok) {
    return descriptorSafety;
  }

  for (const [, descriptor] of descriptorEntries(descriptors)) {
    const nestedSafety = scanNestedSafety(descriptor.value);

    if (!nestedSafety.ok) {
      return nestedSafety;
    }
  }

  const source = descriptorValue(descriptors, "source");
  const agentRole = descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentRole");
  const providerStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "providerStatus");
  const outputClass = descriptorValue(descriptors, "outputClass");
  const contentFingerprint = descriptorValue(descriptors, "contentFingerprint");
  const boundedEvidence = descriptorValue(descriptors, "boundedEvidence");
  const sanitizedSummary = descriptorValue(descriptors, "sanitizedSummary");

  if (
    source !== PROVENANCE_SOURCE ||
    agentRole !== AGENT_ROLE ||
    providerStatus !== PROVIDER_STATUS ||
    outputClass !== ACCEPTED_OUTPUT_CLASS ||
    boundedEvidence !== "present"
  ) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "malformed"
    };
  }

  if (
    typeof contentFingerprint !== "string" ||
    !/^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u.test(contentFingerprint)
  ) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "malformed"
    };
  }

  if (
    typeof sanitizedSummary !== "string" ||
    sanitizedSummary.length === 0 ||
    sanitizedSummary.length > SCAN_BOUNDS.maxSummaryLength ||
    hasDeniedSummaryText(sanitizedSummary)
  ) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "malformed"
    };
  }

  return {
    ok: true,
    provenance: createProvenance({
      outputClass,
      contentFingerprint,
      boundedEvidence,
      sanitizedSummary
    })
  };
}

export function createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
  input = {},
  candidateOrderValue = 0
) {
  if (!isRecord(input)) {
    return createBlockedRecord(
      candidateOrderValue,
      nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(input) ? "hostile" : "malformed"
    );
  }

  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(input);

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
  for (const field of AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS) {
    const expectedValue = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags[field];
    const authorityValue = descriptorValue(authorityDescriptors, field);
    const mirroredValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, field);

    if (authorityValue !== expectedValue || mirroredValue !== expectedValue) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      addReason(reasons, "contradictory-readiness-metadata");
    }
  }

  if (Object.keys(authorityDescriptors).length !== AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS.length) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
  }
}

function provenanceStatusFor(reasons) {
  if (reasons.includes("hostile-provenance") || reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")) {
    return "hostile";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("raw-marker-present")) {
    return "raw-marker-present";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("missing-provenance")) {
    return "missing";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("provider-status-not-not-called")) {
    return "provider-called";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("malformed-provenance")) {
    return "malformed";
  }

  return "reviewable-non-secret";
}

function nonCanonicalStatusFor(reasons) {
  if (reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")) {
    return "hostile";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("caller-identity-spoof")) {
    return "spoofed-identity";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("contradictory-readiness-metadata")) {
    return "contradictory";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("missing-non-canonical-authority")) {
    return "missing-authority";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("permissive-authority-flags")) {
    return "permissive-authority";
  }

  return "non-canonical";
}

function analyzeCandidate(input) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(input);

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      candidateId: UNAVAILABLE,
      agentCandidateId: UNAVAILABLE
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const identity = validateIdentity(descriptors, reasons);

  scanDescriptorValues(descriptors, [], reasons);

  for (const [key, descriptor] of descriptorEntries(descriptors)) {
    if (
      typeof key === "symbol" ||
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor)
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanNestedSafety(descriptor.value, [key], reasons);
  }

  validateProvenance(descriptors, reasons);
  validateAuthorityFlags(descriptors, reasons);

  return {
    ...identity,
    reasons
  };
}

export function createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(
  input = {},
  readinessOrderValue = 0
) {
  const readinessOrder = normalizeReadinessOrder(readinessOrderValue);
  const analysis = analyzeCandidate(input);
  const blockedReasons = deepFreeze(orderedReasons(analysis.reasons));
  const isReady = blockedReasons.length === 0;
  const authorityFlags = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags;

  return deepFreeze({
    promotionReadinessId: createPromotionReadinessId(readinessOrder),
    candidateId: analysis.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: analysis.agentCandidateId,
    readinessOrder,
    readinessState: isReady ? READY_STATE : BLOCKED_STATE,
    disposition: isReady ? READY_DISPOSITION : BLOCKED_DISPOSITION,
    blockedReasons,
    provenanceStatus: provenanceStatusFor(blockedReasons),
    nonCanonicalStatus: nonCanonicalStatusFor(blockedReasons),
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags
  });
}

export function createAgentAPromotionReadinessRegistry() {

    const record = createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(
      input,
      nextReadinessOrder
    );
    nextReadinessOrder += 1;
    records.push(record);

    return record;

  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-non-canonical-authority");
    return;
  }

  let authorityDescriptors;

  try {
    authorityDescriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(
      authorityDescriptor.value
    );
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-non-canonical-authority");
    return;
  }

  for (const field of AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS) {
    const expectedValue = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags[field];
    const authorityValue = descriptorValue(authorityDescriptors, field);
    const mirroredValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, field);

    if (authorityValue !== expectedValue || mirroredValue !== expectedValue) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      addReason(reasons, "contradictory-promotion-metadata");
    }
  }

  if (Object.keys(authorityDescriptors).length !== AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS.length) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
  }
}

function readinessBlockedReasonsIndicateNonReady(blockedReasons, reasons) {
  if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(blockedReasons)) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return false;
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(blockedReasons)) {
    return true;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(blockedReasons);
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return false;
  }

  const lengthDescriptor = descriptors.length;

  if (
    hasAccessorDescriptor(lengthDescriptor) ||
    typeof lengthDescriptor?.value !== "number" ||
    !Number.isSafeInteger(lengthDescriptor.value) ||
    lengthDescriptor.value < 0
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-readiness");
    return true;
  }

  return lengthDescriptor.value > 0;
}

function analyzeCandidate(candidate) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    candidate,
    "missing-candidate",
    "malformed-candidate"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      candidateId: UNAVAILABLE,
      agentCandidateId: UNAVAILABLE,
      candidateContentFingerprint: UNAVAILABLE
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const identity = validateCandidateIdentity(descriptors, reasons);

  scanDescriptorValues(descriptors, [], reasons, "candidate");

  for (const [key, descriptor] of descriptorEntries(descriptors)) {
    if (
      typeof key === "symbol" ||
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor)
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanNestedSafety(descriptor.value, [key], reasons, "candidate");
  }

  const candidateContentFingerprint = validateCandidateProvenance(
    descriptors,
    reasons
  );
  validateAuthorityFlags(descriptors, reasons);

  return {
    ...identity,
    candidateContentFingerprint,
    reasons
  };
}

function validateReadinessShape(descriptors, reasons) {
  const readinessOrder = descriptorValue(descriptors, "readinessOrder");
  const promotionReadinessId = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "promotionReadinessId"
  );
  const readinessState = descriptorValue(descriptors, "readinessState");
  const disposition = descriptorValue(descriptors, "disposition");
  const blockedReasons = descriptorValue(descriptors, "blockedReasons");
  const provenanceStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "provenanceStatus");
  const nonCanonicalStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "nonCanonicalStatus");

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(readinessOrder) || readinessOrder < 0) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-readiness");
    return {
      promotionReadinessId: UNAVAILABLE,
      candidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId"),
      agentCandidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId")
    };
  }

  const expectedReadinessId = createPromotionReadinessId(readinessOrder);

  if (promotionReadinessId !== expectedReadinessId) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-readiness");
  }

  const nonReadyShape =
    readinessState !== READY_READINESS_STATE ||
    disposition !== READY_DISPOSITION ||
    readinessBlockedReasonsIndicateNonReady(blockedReasons, reasons);

  if (nonReadyShape) {
    addReason(reasons, "readiness-not-ready");
  }

  if (
    !nonReadyShape &&
    (provenanceStatus !== "reviewable-non-secret" ||
      nonCanonicalStatus !== "non-canonical")
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-readiness");
  }

  return {
    promotionReadinessId:
      promotionReadinessId === expectedReadinessId
        ? promotionReadinessId
        : UNAVAILABLE,
    candidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId"),
    agentCandidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId")
  };
}

function validateReadinessIdentity(readinessIdentity, candidateAnalysis, reasons) {
  if (
    candidateAnalysis.candidateId === UNAVAILABLE ||
    readinessIdentity.candidateId === undefined
  ) {
    return;
  }

  if (
    readinessIdentity.candidateId !== candidateAnalysis.candidateId ||
    readinessIdentity.agentCandidateId !== candidateAnalysis.agentCandidateId
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "candidate-readiness-identity-mismatch");
  }
}

function analyzeReadiness(readiness, candidateAnalysis) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    readiness,
    "missing-readiness",

function assertDeepFrozen(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function")) {
    return;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return;
  }

  seen.add(value);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(value), true, "expected deep-frozen output");

  for (const descriptor of Object.values(Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value))) {
    assert.equal(
      typeof descriptor.get,
      "undefined",
      "public output must not expose getters"
    );
    assertDeepFrozen(descriptor.value, seen);
  }
}

function assertRecordShape(record) {
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), publicRecordKeys);
  assertDeepFrozen(record);
}

function assertCommitted(

) {

  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "fixture-package-record-updated");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.deepEqual(record.failureReasons, []);
  assert.equal(record.targetPackagePath, CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH);
  assert.equal(record.beforeVersionHash, beforeVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.afterVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.targetVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.candidateContentFingerprint, candidateContentFingerprint);
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, true);
  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
  assert.match(record.transactionEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record.recoveryRecord), [
    "recoveryStatus",
    "beforeVersionHash",
    "afterVersionHash",
    "recoveryEvidenceHash"
  ]);
  assert.equal(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.match(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
}

function assertBlocked(record, expectedReasons) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-blocked");
  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "commit-failed");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-noop-recorded");
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, false);
  for (const reason of expectedReasons) {

}

export function createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(
  candidate = undefined,
  readiness = undefined,
  requestOrderValue = 0
) {
  const requestOrder = normalizeRequestOrder(requestOrderValue);
  const candidateAnalysis = analyzeCandidate(candidate);
  const readinessAnalysis = analyzeReadiness(readiness, candidateAnalysis);
  const requestBlockedReasons = deepFreeze(
    orderedReasons([...candidateAnalysis.reasons, ...readinessAnalysis.reasons])
  );
  const isReviewable = requestBlockedReasons.length === 0;
  const authorityFlags = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags;

  return deepFreeze({
    promotionRequestId: createPromotionRequestId(requestOrder),
    promotionReadinessId: readinessAnalysis.promotionReadinessId ?? UNAVAILABLE,
    candidateId: candidateAnalysis.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: candidateAnalysis.agentCandidateId,
    requestOrder,
    requestState: isReviewable ? REVIEWABLE_STATE : BLOCKED_STATE,
    preflightStatus: isReviewable ? PASSED_PREFLIGHT : BLOCKED_STATE,
    reviewStatus: isReviewable ? PENDING_REVIEW : BLOCKED_STATE,
    requestBlockedReasons,
    candidateContentFingerprint: candidateAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint,
    readinessEvidenceHash: createEvidenceHash(readiness),
    provenanceStatus: provenanceStatusFor(requestBlockedReasons),
    nonCanonicalStatus: nonCanonicalStatusFor(requestBlockedReasons),
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags
  });
}

export function createAgentAPromotionRequestRegistry() {
  let nextRequestOrder = 0;
  const records = [];

  function registerPromotionRequest(candidate = undefined, readiness = undefined) {
    const record = createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(
      candidate,
      readiness,
      nextRequestOrder
    );
    nextRequestOrder += 1;
    records.push(record);

    return record;
      };
}

function validateAuthorityFlags(descriptors, reasons, malformedReason) {
  const authorityDescriptor = descriptors.authorityFlags;

  if (
    !authorityDescriptor ||
    hasAccessorDescriptor(authorityDescriptor) ||
    !authorityDescriptor.value ||
    typeof authorityDescriptor.value !== "object" ||
    !isPlainRecord(authorityDescriptor.value)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-non-canonical-authority");
    return;
  }

  let authorityDescriptors;

  try {
    authorityDescriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(
      authorityDescriptor.value
    );
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return;
  }

  for (const field of AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS) {
    const expectedValue = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags[field];
    const authorityValue = descriptorValue(authorityDescriptors, field);
    const mirroredValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, field);

    if (authorityValue !== expectedValue || mirroredValue !== expectedValue) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      addReason(reasons, "contradictory-write-metadata");
    }
  }

  const expectedFields = new Set(AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS);
  const authorityKeys = Reflect.ownKeys(authorityDescriptors);

  for (const key of authorityKeys) {
    if (typeof key !== "string" || !expectedFields.has(key)) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");

      if (typeof key === "symbol") {
        addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      }
    }
  }

  if (authorityKeys.length !== AUTHORITY_FLAG_FIELDS.length) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
  }
}

function validateRequestShape(descriptors, reasons) {
  const requestOrder = descriptorValue(descriptors, "requestOrder");
  const promotionRequestId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "promotionRequestId");
  const promotionReadinessId = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "promotionReadinessId"
  );
  const candidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId");
  const agentCandidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId");
  const requestState = descriptorValue(descriptors, "requestState");
  const preflightStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "preflightStatus");
  const reviewStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "reviewStatus");
  const requestBlockedReasons = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "requestBlockedReasons"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprintValue = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const provenanceStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "provenanceStatus");
  const nonCanonicalStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "nonCanonicalStatus");
  const readinessEvidenceHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "readinessEvidenceHash"
  );

  let validPromotionRequestId = UNAVAILABLE;

  if (!isValidEvidenceHash(readinessEvidenceHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-request");
  }

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(requestOrder) || requestOrder < 0) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-request");
  } else {
    const expectedPromotionRequestId = createPromotionRequestId(requestOrder);

    if (promotionRequestId !== expectedPromotionRequestId) {
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-request");
    } else {
      validPromotionRequestId = promotionRequestId;
    }
  }

  const nonReviewableShape =
    requestState !== REVIEWABLE_REQUEST_STATE ||
    preflightStatus !== PASSED_PREFLIGHT_STATUS ||
    reviewStatus !== PENDING_REVIEW_STATUS ||
    requestBlockedReasonsIndicateNonReviewable(requestBlockedReasons, reasons);

  if (nonReviewableShape) {
    addReason(reasons, "request-not-reviewable");
  }

  if (
    !nonReviewableShape &&
    (provenanceStatus !== "reviewable-non-secret" ||
      nonCanonicalStatus !== "non-canonical")
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-request");
  }

  if (nonReviewableShape) {
    return {
      promotionRequestId: validPromotionRequestId,
      promotionReadinessId: isValidPromotionReadinessId(promotionReadinessId)
        ? promotionReadinessId
        : UNAVAILABLE,
      ...normalizeUpstreamBlockedCandidateIds(candidateId, agentCandidateId),
      candidateContentFingerprint: normalizeUpstreamBlockedContentFingerprint(
        candidateContentFingerprintValue
      )
    };
  }

  return {
    promotionRequestId: validPromotionRequestId,
    promotionReadinessId: validatePromotionReadinessId(
      promotionReadinessId,
      reasons
    ),
    ...validateCandidateIds(candidateId, agentCandidateId, reasons),
    candidateContentFingerprint: validateContentFingerprintValue(
      candidateContentFingerprintValue,
      reasons
    )
  };
}

function analyzeRequest(request) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    request,
    "missing-request",
    "malformed-request"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      promotionRequestId: UNAVAILABLE,
      promotionReadinessId: UNAVAILABLE,
      candidateId: UNAVAILABLE,
      agentCandidateId: UNAVAILABLE,
      candidateContentFingerprint: UNAVAILABLE
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const identity = validateRequestShape(descriptors, reasons);
  const schemaState = { hasUnknownField: false };
  const semanticReasonCount = reasons.length;

  scanDescriptorValues(descriptors, [], reasons, "request", schemaState);

  for (const [key, descriptor] of descriptorEntries(descriptors)) {
    if (
      typeof key === "symbol" ||
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      isSchemaMissingValueDescriptor(key, [], descriptor.value)
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanNestedSafety(
      descriptor.value,
      [normalizeFieldName(key)],
      reasons,
      "request",
      schemaState
    );
  }

  validateAuthorityFlags(descriptors, reasons, "malformed-request");
  scanRawMarkersDeep(request, reasons);
  finalizeUnknownSchemaFields(schemaState, reasons, semanticReasonCount);

  return {
    ...identity,
    reasons
  };
}

function validateInvocationShape(descriptors, reasons, requestAnalysis) {
  const governedFlowKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "governedFlowKind");
  const invocationKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "invocationKind");
  const mutationMode = descriptorValue(descriptors, "mutationMode");
  const effect = descriptorValue(descriptors, "effect");
  const providerStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "providerStatus");
  const operatorReviewRequired = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "operatorReviewRequired"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprintValue = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const requestIsAlreadyNonReviewable =
    requestAnalysis.reasons.includes("request-not-reviewable");
  const candidateContentFingerprint = requestIsAlreadyNonReviewable
    ? normalizeUpstreamBlockedContentFingerprint(candidateContentFingerprintValue)
    : validateContentFingerprintValue(candidateContentFingerprintValue, reasons);

  if (governedFlowKind !== ACCEPTED_FLOW_KIND) {
    addReason(reasons, "unknown-flow-kind");
  }

  if (
    invocationKind !== ACCEPTED_INVOCATION_KIND ||
    effect !== ACCEPTED_EFFECT ||
    providerStatus !== PROVIDER_STATUS
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-invocation-evidence");
  }

  if (operatorReviewRequired !== true) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-invocation-evidence");
  }

  if (mutationMode !== ACCEPTED_MUTATION_MODE) {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-non-mutating-invocation");
  }

  return {
    governedFlowKind:
      governedFlowKind === ACCEPTED_FLOW_KIND ? governedFlowKind : UNAVAILABLE,
    promotionRequestId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "promotionRequestId"),
    promotionReadinessId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "promotionReadinessId"),
    candidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId"),
    agentCandidateId: descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId"),
    candidateContentFingerprint
  };
}

function validateInvocationIdentity(invocationIdentity, requestAnalysis, reasons) {
  if (
    requestAnalysis.promotionRequestId === UNAVAILABLE ||
    requestAnalysis.promotionReadinessId === UNAVAILABLE ||
    requestAnalysis.candidateId === UNAVAILABLE ||
    requestAnalysis.agentCandidateId === UNAVAILABLE ||
    requestAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint === UNAVAILABLE
  ) {
    return;
  }

  if (
    invocationIdentity.promotionRequestId !== requestAnalysis.promotionRequestId ||
    invocationIdentity.promotionReadinessId !==
      requestAnalysis.promotionReadinessId ||
    invocationIdentity.candidateId !== requestAnalysis.candidateId ||
    invocationIdentity.agentCandidateId !== requestAnalysis.agentCandidateId ||
    invocationIdentity.candidateContentFingerprint !==
      requestAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "request-invocation-identity-mismatch");
  }
}

function analyzeInvocation(invocation, requestAnalysis) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    invocation,
    "missing-invocation-evidence",
    "malformed-invocation-evidence"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {

    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const identity = validateInvocationShape(descriptors, reasons, requestAnalysis);
  const schemaState = { hasUnknownField: false };
  const semanticReasonCount = reasons.length;

  scanDescriptorValues(descriptors, [], reasons, "invocation", schemaState);

  for (const [key, descriptor] of descriptorEntries(descriptors)) {
    if (
      typeof key === "symbol" ||
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      isSchemaMissingValueDescriptor(key, [], descriptor.value)
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanNestedSafety(
      descriptor.value,
      [normalizeFieldName(key)],
      reasons,
      "invocation",
      schemaState
    );
  }

  validateAuthorityFlags(descriptors, reasons, "malformed-invocation-evidence");
  validateInvocationIdentity(identity, requestAnalysis, reasons);
  scanRawMarkersDeep(invocation, reasons);
  finalizeUnknownSchemaFields(schemaState, reasons, semanticReasonCount);

  return {
    ...identity,
    reasons
  };
}

function sortSnapshotKeys(keys) {
  return [...keys].sort((left, right) => String(left).localeCompare(String(right)));
}

function isArrayIndexKey(key) {
  if (typeof key !== "string" || key.length === 0) {
    return false;
  }

  const index = Number(key);

  return (
    Number.isInteger(index) &&
    index >= 0 &&
    index < 2 ** 32 - 1 &&
    String(index) === key
  );
}

function createSnapshotObject() {
  return Object.create(null);
}

function defineSnapshotProperty(target, key, value) {
  Object.defineProperty(target, key, {
    value,
    enumerable: true,
    configurable: true,
    writable: true
  });
}

function updateSnapshotDigestMaterial(digest, value) {
  const material = JSON.stringify(value) ?? "undefined";

  digest.update(String(material.length));
  digest.update(":");
  digest.update(material);
}

function createSnapshotMaterialDigest(value) {
  const digest = createHash("sha256");

  updateSnapshotDigestMaterial(digest, value);

  return `sha256:${digest.digest("hex")}`;
}

function createBoundedArrayEntryDigest() {
  return createHash("sha256");
}

function updateBoundedArrayEntryDigest(digest, key, descriptorSnapshot) {
  updateSnapshotDigestMaterial(digest, [
    "bounded-array-entry",
    key,
    descriptorSnapshot
  ]);
}

function createOmittedDescriptorDigestSnapshot(descriptor, depth) {
  return createDescriptorSnapshot(descriptor, new WeakSet(), depth, {
    objectCount: 0
  });
}

function createDescriptorSnapshot(descriptor, seen, depth, budget) {
  if (hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor)) {
    return { type: "accessor" };
  }

  if (hasCallableDescriptor(descriptor)) {
    return { type: "function" };
  }

  return createCanonicalSnapshot(descriptor.value, seen, depth, budget);
}

function createArraySnapshot(descriptors, seen, depth, budget) {
  const lengthDescriptor = descriptors.length;
  const length = Number.isSafeInteger(lengthDescriptor?.value)
    ? lengthDescriptor.value
    : 0;
  const snapshotLength = Math.min(length, SCAN_BOUNDS.maxObjectCount);
  const snapshot = [];
  const properties = createSnapshotObject();
  let hasBoundedLength = length !== snapshotLength;
  let hasProperties = false;
  let boundedArrayEntryDigest;

  snapshot.length = snapshotLength;

  for (const key of sortSnapshotKeys(Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors))) {
    if (key === "length") {
      continue;
    }

    const descriptor = descriptors[key];

    if (isArrayIndexKey(key)) {
      const index = Number(key);

      if (index < snapshotLength) {
        const descriptorSnapshot = createDescriptorSnapshot(
          descriptor,
          seen,
          depth + 1,
          budget
        );

        defineSnapshotProperty(snapshot, key, descriptorSnapshot);
      } else {
        hasBoundedLength = true;
        boundedArrayEntryDigest ??= createBoundedArrayEntryDigest();
        updateBoundedArrayEntryDigest(
          boundedArrayEntryDigest,
          key,
          createOmittedDescriptorDigestSnapshot(descriptor, depth + 1)
        );
      }

      continue;
    }

    const descriptorSnapshot = createDescriptorSnapshot(
      descriptor,
      seen,
      depth + 1,
      budget
    );
    const snapshotKey =
      typeof key === "symbol"
        ? `symbol:${symbolIdentityFingerprint(key)}`
        : key;
    defineSnapshotProperty(properties, snapshotKey, descriptorSnapshot);
    hasProperties = true;
  }

  if (!hasBoundedLength && !hasProperties) {
    return snapshot;
  }

  return {
    type: "array",
    items: snapshot,
    ...(hasBoundedLength
      ? {
          length: {
            type: "bounded-count",
            digest: createSnapshotMaterialDigest(["array-length", length])
          }
        }
      : {}),
    ...(boundedArrayEntryDigest
      ? {
          boundedEntries: {
            type: "bounded-array-entry-digest",
            digest: `sha256:${boundedArrayEntryDigest.digest("hex")}`
          }
        }
      : {}),
    ...(hasProperties ? { properties } : {})
  };
}

function createCanonicalSnapshot(
  value,
  seen = new WeakSet(),
  depth = 0,
  budget = { objectCount: 0 }
) {
  if (value === undefined) {
    return { type: "undefined" };
  }

  if (value === null || typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value;
  }

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    return Number.isFinite(value)
      ? value
      : { type: "non-finite-number", value: String(value) };
  }

  if (typeof value === "string") {
    return rawMarkerValue(value)
      ? { type: "raw-marker", fingerprint: rawMarkerFingerprint(value) }
      : value;
  }

  if (typeof value === "bigint") {
    return {
      type: "bigint",
      fingerprint: unsupportedScalarFingerprint("bigint", value)
    };
  }

  if (typeof value === "symbol") {
    return {
      type: "symbol",
      fingerprint: symbolIdentityFingerprint(value)
    };
  }

  if (typeof value === "function") {
    return { type: "function" };
  }

  if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
    return { type: "hostile-proxy" };
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(value) && !isPlainRecord(value)) {
    return { type: "unsupported-object" };
  }

  if (depth > SCAN_BOUNDS.maxDepth) {
    return { type: "bounded-depth" };
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return { type: "circular" };
  }

  seen.add(value);
  budget.objectCount += 1;

  if (budget.objectCount > SCAN_BOUNDS.maxObjectCount) {
    return { type: "bounded-count" };
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    return { type: "hostile-descriptor" };
  }

  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return createArraySnapshot(descriptors, seen, depth, budget);
  }

  const snapshot = createSnapshotObject();

  for (const key of sortSnapshotKeys(Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors))) {
    const descriptor = descriptors[key];
    const snapshotKey =
      typeof key === "symbol"
        ? `symbol:${symbolIdentityFingerprint(key)}`
        : key;

    defineSnapshotProperty(
      snapshot,
      snapshotKey,
      createDescriptorSnapshot(descriptor, seen, depth + 1, budget)
    );
  }

  return snapshot;
}

function canonicalJson(value) {
  return JSON.stringify(createCanonicalSnapshot(value));
}

function evidenceDigestContainerKind(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return "array";
  }

  let prototype;

  try {
    prototype = Object.getPrototypeOf(value);
  } catch {
    return "hostile-prototype";
  }

  if (prototype === null) {
    return "null-prototype-object";
  }

  return prototype === Object.prototype ? "object" : "unsupported-object";
}

function evidenceDigestKey(key) {
  return typeof key === "symbol"
    ? { type: "symbol", fingerprint: symbolIdentityFingerprint(key) }
    : { type: "string", value: key };
}

function updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, value) {
  updateSnapshotDigestMaterial(digest, value);
}

function updateEvidenceDigestScalar(digest, value) {
  if (value === undefined) {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "scalar",
      "undefined",
      unsupportedScalarFingerprint("undefined", "undefined")
    ]);
    return;
  }

  if (value === null) {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["scalar", "null"]);
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["scalar", "boolean", value]);
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(
      digest,
      Number.isFinite(value)
        ? ["scalar", "number", Object.is(value, -0) ? "-0" : String(value)]
        : [
            "scalar",
            "non-finite-number",
            unsupportedScalarFingerprint("non-finite-number", value)
          ]
    );
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "string") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(
      digest,
      rawMarkerValue(value)
        ? ["scalar", "raw-marker", rawMarkerFingerprint(value)]
        : ["scalar", "string", value]
    );
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "bigint") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "scalar",
      "bigint",
      unsupportedScalarFingerprint("bigint", value)
    ]);
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "symbol") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "scalar",
      "symbol",
      symbolIdentityFingerprint(value)
    ]);
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "function") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "scalar",
      "function",
      callableIdentityFingerprint(value)
    ]);
  }
}

function updateEvidenceDigestDescriptor(digest, descriptor, stack) {
  updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
    "descriptor",
    hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ? "accessor" : "data",
    "enumerable",
    descriptor.enumerable === true,
    "configurable",
    descriptor.configurable === true
  ]);

  if (hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor)) {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "accessor",
      "get",
      typeof descriptor.get === "function"
        ? callableIdentityFingerprint(descriptor.get)
        : null,
      "set",
      typeof descriptor.set === "function"
        ? callableIdentityFingerprint(descriptor.set)
        : null
    ]);
    return;
  }

  updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
    "data",
    "writable",
    descriptor.writable === true
  ]);
  stack.push({
    type: "value",
    value: descriptor.value
  });
}

function updateEvidenceDigestValue(digest, value, state, stack) {
  if (!value || (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function")) {
    updateEvidenceDigestScalar(digest, value);
    return;
  }

  if (typeof value === "function") {
    updateEvidenceDigestScalar(digest, value);
    return;
  }

  if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["object", "hostile-proxy"]);
    return;
  }

  const referenceId = state.references.get(value);

  if (referenceId !== undefined) {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["object-reference", referenceId]);
    return;
  }

  const nextReferenceId = state.nextReferenceId;
  state.nextReferenceId += 1;
  state.references.set(value, nextReferenceId);

  const containerKind = evidenceDigestContainerKind(value);

  updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
    "object-start",
    nextReferenceId,
    containerKind
  ]);

  if (containerKind === "hostile-prototype") {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["object-end", nextReferenceId]);
    return;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
      "object-descriptors",
      "hostile-descriptor"
    ]);
    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["object-end", nextReferenceId]);
    return;
  }

  const keys = Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors);

  updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["descriptor-count", keys.length]);
  stack.push({
    type: "object-end",
    referenceId: nextReferenceId
  });

  for (let index = keys.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
    const key = keys[index];

    stack.push({
      type: "descriptor",
      index,
      key,
      descriptor: descriptors[key]
    });
  }
}

function createFullEvidenceDigest(value) {
  const digest = createHash("sha256");
  const state = {
    references: new WeakMap(),
    nextReferenceId: 0
  };
  const stack = [
    {
      type: "value",
      value
    }
  ];

  while (stack.length > 0) {
    const frame = stack.pop();

    if (frame.type === "value") {
      updateEvidenceDigestValue(digest, frame.value, state, stack);
      continue;
    }

    if (frame.type === "descriptor") {
      updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, [
        "descriptor-key",
        frame.index,
        evidenceDigestKey(frame.key)
      ]);
      updateEvidenceDigestDescriptor(digest, frame.descriptor, stack);
      continue;
    }

    updateEvidenceDigestMaterial(digest, ["object-end", frame.referenceId]);
  }

  return digest.digest("hex");
}

function createEvidenceHash(evidence) {
  return `sha256:${createFullEvidenceDigest(evidence)}`;
}

function provenanceStatusFor(reasons) {
  if (reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")) {
    return "hostile";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("raw-marker-present")) {
    return "raw-marker-present";
  }

  if (
    reasons.includes("missing-request") ||
    reasons.includes("missing-invocation-evidence")
  ) {
    return "missing";
  }

  if (
    reasons.includes("request-not-reviewable") ||
    reasons.includes("malformed-request") ||
    reasons.includes("malformed-invocation-evidence") ||
    reasons.includes("malformed-content-fingerprint")
  ) {
    return "malformed";
  }

  return "reviewable-non-secret";
}

function nonCanonicalStatusFor(reasons) {
  if (reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")) {
    return "hostile";
  }

  if (reasons.includes("caller-admission-spoof")) {
    return "spoofed-admission";
  }

function assertNoDeniedMarkers(value, label) {
  const serialized = JSON.stringify(value);

  for (const marker of deniedRawMarkers) {
    assert.equal(
      serialized.includes(marker),
      false,
      `${label} must not leak marker: ${marker}`
    );
  }
}

function assertNoDeniedPublicFields(value, label) {
  for (const field of deniedPublicFieldNames) {
    assert.equal(Object.hasOwn(value, field), false, `${label} exposes ${field}`);
  }
}

function assertAuthorityFlags(value, label) {
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(value.authorityFlags), authorityFlagFields, label);
  assert.equal(value.candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource, true, label);
  assert.equal(value.canonicalSourceMutationAllowed, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.canonicalMutationAllowed, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.candidatePromotionAuthorized, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.externalEditAdoptionAllowed, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.governedImportRequired, true, label);
  assert.equal(value.aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.rawCandidateContentRetained, false, label);
  assert.equal(value.filesystemPathRetained, false, label);

  for (const field of authorityFlagFields) {
    assert.equal(value[field], value.authorityFlags[field], `${label} ${field}`);
  }
}

function assertAdmissionShape(value, label) {
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(value), publicFields, `${label} keys`);
  assertDeepFrozen(value, label);
  assertNoDeniedMarkers(value, label);
  assertNoDeniedPublicFields(value, label);
  assertAuthorityFlags(value, label);
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.admissionStates.includes(
      value.admissionState
    ),
    true,
    `${label} admission state vocabulary`
  );
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.writeIntentStatuses.includes(
      value.writeIntentStatus
    ),
    true,
    `${label} write-intent status vocabulary`
  );
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.reviewStatuses.includes(
      value.reviewStatus
    ),
    true,
    `${label} review status vocabulary`
  );
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.governedFlowKinds.includes(
      value.governedFlowKind
    ),
    true,
    `${label} flow kind vocabulary`
  );
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.provenanceStatuses.includes(
      value.provenanceStatus
    ),
    true,
    `${label} provenance status vocabulary`
  );
  assert.equal(
    AGENT_A_WRITE_ADMISSION_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.nonCanonicalStatuses.includes(
      value.nonCanonicalStatus
    ),
    true,
    `${label} non-canonical status vocabulary`
  );

  for (const reason of value.admissionBlockedReasons) {
    assert.equal(blockedReasons.includes(reason), true, `${label} reason ${reason}`);
  }
}

function assertAdmittedRecord(value, order, request, label) {
  assertAdmissionShape(value, label);
  assert.equal(
    value.writeIntentId,
    `agent-a-write-intent:${String(order).padStart(4, "0")}`
  );
  assert.equal(value.promotionRequestId, request.promotionRequestId);
  assert.equal(value.promotionReadinessId, request.promotionReadinessId);
  assert.equal(value.candidateId, request.candidateId);
  assert.equal(value.agentCandidateId, request.agentCandidateId);
  assert.equal(value.admissionOrder, order);
  assert.equal(value.admissionState, "admitted");
  assert.equal(value.writeIntentStatus, "intent-recorded");
  assert.equal(value.reviewStatus, "pending-review");
  assert.deepEqual(value.admissionBlockedReasons, []);
  assert.equal(value.governedFlowKind, "agent-a-governed-canonical-write");
  assert.match(value.requestEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.match(value.invocationEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.equal(value.candidateContentFingerprint, request.candidateContentFingerprint);
  assert.equal(value.provenanceStatus, "reviewable-non-secret");
  assert.equal(value.nonCanonicalStatus, "non-canonical");
}

function assertBlockedRecord(
  value,
  order,
  request,
  reasons,
  label,
  expected = {}
) {
  assertAdmissionShape(value, label);
  assert.equal(
    value.writeIntentId,
    `agent-a-write-intent:${String(order).padStart(4, "0")}`
  );
  assert.equal(
    value.promotionRequestId,
    expected.promotionRequestId ?? request?.promotionRequestId ?? "unavailable"
  );
  assert.equal(
    value.promotionReadinessId,
    expected.promotionReadinessId ?? request?.promotionReadinessId ?? "unavailable"
  );
  assert.equal(
    value.candidateId,
    expected.candidateId ?? request?.candidateId ?? "unavailable"
  );
  assert.equal(
    value.agentCandidateId,
    expected.agentCandidateId ?? request?.agentCandidateId ?? "unavailable"
  );
  assert.equal(value.admissionOrder, order);
  assert.equal(value.admissionState, "blocked");
  assert.equal(value.writeIntentStatus, "blocked");
  assert.equal(value.reviewStatus, "blocked");
  assert.deepEqual(value.admissionBlockedReasons, reasons);
  assert.equal(
    value.candidateContentFingerprint,
    expected.candidateContentFingerprint ??
      request?.candidateContentFingerprint ??
      "unavailable"
  );
  assert.match(value.requestEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.match(value.invocationEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.equal(
    value.provenanceStatus === "reviewable-non-secret",
    reasons.includes("missing-request") ||
      reasons.includes("missing-invocation-evidence") ||
      reasons.includes("request-not-reviewable") ||
      reasons.includes("malformed-request") ||
      reasons.includes("malformed-invocation-evidence") ||
      reasons.includes("malformed-content-fingerprint") ||
      reasons.includes("raw-marker-present") ||
      reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")
      ? false
      : true,
    `${label} provenance semantic consistency`
  );
  assert.equal(
    value.nonCanonicalStatus === "non-canonical",
    reasons.includes("unknown-flow-kind") ||
      reasons.includes("request-invocation-identity-mismatch") ||
      reasons.includes("missing-non-mutating-invocation") ||
      reasons.includes("missing-non-canonical-authority") ||
      reasons.includes("permissive-authority-flags") ||
      reasons.includes("caller-admission-spoof") ||
      reasons.includes("contradictory-write-metadata") ||
      reasons.includes("hostile-caller-object")
      ? false
      : true,
    `${label} authority semantic consistency`
  );
}

function assertBlockedRecordIncludesReason(
  value,
  order,
  request,
  reason,
  label,
  expected = {}
) {
  assert.equal(
    value.admissionBlockedReasons.includes(reason),
    true,
    `${label} must include ${reason}: ${value.admissionBlockedReasons.join(",")}`
  );
  assertBlockedRecord(
    value,
    order,
    request,
    value.admissionBlockedReasons,
    label,
    expected
  );
}

// Trace: docs/traceability/K2_traceability.yaml (entry K2-008); Direct REQ: REQ-KN-127, REQ-KN-128.
// NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001: no project/package IO, renderer UI, Electron IPC, provider calls, parser/projection/layout engines, import/promotion/save/export behavior, or canonical mutation behavior.

export const CANDIDATE_STAGING_ORIGINS = Object.freeze([
  "unknown",
  "external-edit",
  "ai-output",
  "generated-output",
  "manual-staging"
]);

export const CANDIDATE_STAGING_STATES = Object.freeze([
  "separated",
  "staged",
  "blocked",
  "discarded"
]);

export const CANDIDATE_STAGING_AUTHORITY_FLAGS = Object.freeze([
  "candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource",
  "canonicalSourceMutationAllowed",
  "canonicalMutationAllowed",
  "candidatePromotionAuthorized",
  "externalEditAdoptionAllowed",
  "governedImportRequired",
  "aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted",
  "rawCandidateContentRetained",
  "filesystemPathRetained"
]);

function deepFreeze(value) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
    deepFreeze(child);
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

const AUTHORITY_FLAGS = deepFreeze({
  candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource: true,
  canonicalSourceMutationAllowed: false,
  canonicalMutationAllowed: false,
  candidatePromotionAuthorized: false,
  externalEditAdoptionAllowed: false,
  governedImportRequired: true,
  aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted: false,
  rawCandidateContentRetained: false,
  filesystemPathRetained: false
});

export const CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES = deepFreeze({
  authorityFlags: AUTHORITY_FLAGS
});

function readAuthorityFlag(name) {
  return CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags[name];
}

export function candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource");
}

export function canonicalSourceMutationAllowed() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("canonicalSourceMutationAllowed");
}

export function canonicalMutationAllowed() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("canonicalMutationAllowed");
}

export function candidatePromotionAuthorized() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("candidatePromotionAuthorized");
}

export function externalEditAdoptionAllowed() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("externalEditAdoptionAllowed");
}

export function governedImportRequired() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("governedImportRequired");
}

export function aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted");
}

export function rawCandidateContentRetained() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("rawCandidateContentRetained");
}

export function filesystemPathRetained() {
  return readAuthorityFlag("filesystemPathRetained");
}

function normalizeOrigin(value) {
  return CANDIDATE_STAGING_ORIGINS.includes(value) ? value : "unknown";
}

function normalizeState(value) {
  return CANDIDATE_STAGING_STATES.includes(value) ? value : "staged";
}

function normalizeCandidateOrder(value) {
  return Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value >= 0 ? value : 0;
}

function createCandidateId(origin, candidateOrder) {
  return `candidate-staging:${origin}:${String(candidateOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`;
}

export function createCandidateStagingRecord(input = {}, candidateOrderValue = 0) {
  const origin = normalizeOrigin(input?.origin);
  const state = normalizeState(input?.state);
  const candidateOrder = normalizeCandidateOrder(candidateOrderValue);
  const authorityFlags = CANDIDATE_STAGING_CAPABILITIES.authorityFlags;

  return deepFreeze({
    candidateId: createCandidateId(origin, candidateOrder),
    origin,
    state,
    candidateOrder,
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags
  });
}

export function createCandidateStagingViewModel(
  input = {},
  candidateOrderValue = 0
) {
  return deepFreeze({
    ...createCandidateStagingRecord(input, candidateOrderValue),
    candidateStagingVisible: true
  });
}

export function createCandidateStagingRegistry() {
  let nextCandidateOrder = 0;
  const records = [];

  return Object.freeze({
    registerCandidate(input = {}) {
      const record = createCandidateStagingRecord(input, nextCandidateOrder);
      nextCandidateOrder += 1;
      records.push(record);

      return record;
    },
    listCandidateStagingRecords() {
      return deepFreeze([...records]);
    }
  });
}

      listGovernedWriteTransactionRecords
    )
  });
}

function stringArraysEqual(actual, expected) {
  return (

function extractStringArrayFromBody(body) {
  const values = [];
  const stringPattern = /"([^"]+)"/gu;
  let match = stringPattern.exec(body);

  while (match) {
    values.push(match[1]);
    match = stringPattern.exec(body);
  }

  return values;
}

function extractExportedFrozenStringArray(text, exportName) {
  const arrayPattern = new RegExp(
    String.raw`export\s+const\s+${exportName}\s*=\s*Object\.freeze\(\s*\[([\s\S]*?)\]\s*\)`,
    "u"
  );
  const match = text.match(arrayPattern);

  return match ? extractStringArrayFromBody(match[1]) : null;
}

function extractAssertedStringArray(text, exportedName) {
  const arrayPattern = new RegExp(
    String.raw`assert\.deepEqual\(\s*${exportedName}\s*,\s*\[([\s\S]*?)\]\s*\)`,
    "u"
  );
  const match = text.match(arrayPattern);

  return match ? extractStringArrayFromBody(match[1]) : null;
}

export function validateValidatorConfiguration({
  requiredFiles = REQUIRED_FILES,
  governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers = GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS,
  governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames =
    GOVERNED_FILES_WITHOUT_AUTHORITY_FIELD_NAMES,
  forbiddenSourcePatterns = FORBIDDEN_SOURCE_PATTERNS,
  confinedVocabularyGroups = CONFINED_VOCABULARY_GROUPS,
  addError
} = {}) {
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: requiredFiles,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-REQUIRED-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate validator required file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-BOUNDARY-MARKER",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed boundary marker file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-AUTHORITY-FIELD-SCAN-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed authority-field scan file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: forbiddenSourcePatterns,
    getValue: (pattern) => pattern.id,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-DENIED-SOURCE-PATTERN-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate denied source pattern ID",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: confinedVocabularyGroups,
    getValue: (group) => group.ruleId,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-CONFINED-VOCABULARY-GROUP-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate confined vocabulary group rule ID",
    addError
  });
}
